  window.builderIoAbTest = function updateCookiesAndStyles(contentId, variants, isHydrationTarget, isAngularSDK) {
  function getAndSetVariantId() {
    function setCookie(name, value, days) {
      let expires = '';
      if (days) {
        const date = new Date();
        date.setTime(date.getTime() + days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
        expires = '; expires=' + date.toUTCString();
      }
      document.cookie = name + '=' + (value || '') + expires + '; path=/' + '; Secure; SameSite=None';
    }
    function getCookie(name) {
      const nameEQ = name + '=';
      const ca = document.cookie.split(';');
      for (let i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
        let c = ca[i];
        while (c.charAt(0) === ' ') c = c.substring(1, c.length);
        if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) === 0) return c.substring(nameEQ.length, c.length);
      }
      return null;
    }
    const cookieName = `builder.tests.${contentId}`;
    const variantInCookie = getCookie(cookieName);
    const availableIDs = variants.map(vr => vr.id).concat(contentId);
    if (variantInCookie && availableIDs.includes(variantInCookie)) {
      return variantInCookie;
    }
    let n = 0;
    const random = Math.random();
    for (let i = 0; i < variants.length; i++) {
      const variant = variants[i];
      const testRatio = variant.testRatio;
      n += testRatio;
      if (random < n) {
        setCookie(cookieName, variant.id);
        return variant.id;
      }
    }
    setCookie(cookieName, contentId);
    return contentId;
  }
  const winningVariantId = getAndSetVariantId();
  let styleEl = document.currentScript?.previousElementSibling;
  if (isAngularSDK) {
    styleEl = document.currentScript?.parentElement?.previousElementSibling?.querySelector('style');
  }
  if (isHydrationTarget) {
    styleEl.remove();
    const thisScriptEl = document.currentScript;
    thisScriptEl?.remove();
  } else {
    const newStyleStr = variants.concat({
      id: contentId
    }).filter(variant => variant.id !== winningVariantId).map(value => {
      return `.variant-${value.id} {  display: none; }
        `;
    }).join('');
    styleEl.innerHTML = newStyleStr;
  }
}
  window.builderIoRenderContent = function updateVariantVisibility(variantContentId, defaultContentId, isHydrationTarget) {
  if (!navigator.cookieEnabled) {
    return;
  }
  function getCookie(name) {
    const nameEQ = name + '=';
    const ca = document.cookie.split(';');
    for (let i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
      let c = ca[i];
      while (c.charAt(0) === ' ') c = c.substring(1, c.length);
      if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) === 0) return c.substring(nameEQ.length, c.length);
    }
    return null;
  }
  const cookieName = `builder.tests.${defaultContentId}`;
  const winningVariant = getCookie(cookieName);
  const parentDiv = document.currentScript?.parentElement;
  const isDefaultContent = variantContentId === defaultContentId;
  const isWinningVariant = winningVariant === variantContentId;
  if (isWinningVariant && !isDefaultContent) {
    parentDiv?.removeAttribute('hidden');
    parentDiv?.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
  } else if (!isWinningVariant && isDefaultContent) {
    parentDiv?.setAttribute('hidden', 'true');
    parentDiv?.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
  }
  if (isHydrationTarget) {
    if (!isWinningVariant) {
      parentDiv?.remove();
    }
    const thisScriptEl = document.currentScript;
    thisScriptEl?.remove();
  }
  return;
}
  </script><script data-id="builderio-init-personalization-variants-fns" nonce="">
  window.filterWithCustomTargeting = function filterWithCustomTargeting(userAttributes, query, startDate, endDate) {
  function isString(val) {
    return typeof val === 'string';
  }
  function isNumber(val) {
    return typeof val === 'number';
  }
  function objectMatchesQuery(userattr, query) {
    const result = (() => {
      const property = query.property;
      const operator = query.operator;
      let testValue = query.value;
      if (query && query.property === 'urlPath' && query.value && typeof query.value === 'string' && query.value !== '/' && query.value.endsWith('/')) {
        testValue = query.value.slice(0, -1);
      }
      if (!(property && operator)) {
        return true;
      }
      if (Array.isArray(testValue)) {
        if (operator === 'isNot') {
          return testValue.every(val => objectMatchesQuery(userattr, {
            property,
            operator,
            value: val
          }));
        }
        return !!testValue.find(val => objectMatchesQuery(userattr, {
          property,
          operator,
          value: val
        }));
      }
      const value = userattr[property];
      if (Array.isArray(value)) {
        return value.includes(testValue);
      }
      switch (operator) {
        case 'is':
          return value === testValue;
        case 'isNot':
          return value !== testValue;
        case 'contains':
          return (isString(value) || Array.isArray(value)) && value.includes(String(testValue));
        case 'startsWith':
          return isString(value) && value.startsWith(String(testValue));
        case 'endsWith':
          return isString(value) && value.endsWith(String(testValue));
        case 'greaterThan':
          return isNumber(value) && isNumber(testValue) && value > testValue;
        case 'lessThan':
          return isNumber(value) && isNumber(testValue) && value < testValue;
        case 'greaterThanOrEqualTo':
          return isNumber(value) && isNumber(testValue) && value >= testValue;
        case 'lessThanOrEqualTo':
          return isNumber(value) && isNumber(testValue) && value <= testValue;
        default:
          return false;
      }
    })();
    return result;
  }
  const item = {
    query,
    startDate,
    endDate
  };
  const now = userAttributes.date && new Date(userAttributes.date) || new Date();
  if (item.startDate && new Date(item.startDate) > now) {
    return false;
  } else if (item.endDate && new Date(item.endDate) < now) {
    return false;
  }
  if (!item.query || !item.query.length) {
    return true;
  }
  return item.query.every(filter => {
    return objectMatchesQuery(userAttributes, filter);
  });
}
  window.builderIoPersonalization = function getPersonalizedVariant(variants, blockId, isHydrationTarget, locale) {
  if (!navigator.cookieEnabled) {
    return;
  }
  function getCookie(name) {
    const nameEQ = name + '=';
    const ca = document.cookie.split(';');
    for (let i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
      let c = ca[i];
      while (c.charAt(0) == ' ') c = c.substring(1, c.length);
      if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) == 0) return c.substring(nameEQ.length, c.length);
    }
    return null;
  }
  const attributes = JSON.parse(getCookie('builder.userAttributes') || '{}');
  if (locale) {
    attributes.locale = locale;
  }
  const winningVariantIndex = variants?.findIndex(function (variant) {
    return window.filterWithCustomTargeting(attributes, variant.query, variant.startDate, variant.endDate);
  });
  const parentDiv = document.currentScript?.parentElement;
  const variantId = parentDiv?.getAttribute('data-variant-id');
  const isDefaultVariant = variantId === `${blockId}-default`;
  const isWinningVariant = winningVariantIndex !== -1 && variantId === `${blockId}-${winningVariantIndex}` || winningVariantIndex === -1 && isDefaultVariant;
  if (isWinningVariant && !isDefaultVariant) {
    parentDiv?.removeAttribute('hidden');
    parentDiv?.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
  } else if (!isWinningVariant && isDefaultVariant) {
    parentDiv?.setAttribute('hidden', 'true');
    parentDiv?.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
  }
  if (isHydrationTarget) {
    if (!isWinningVariant) {
      const itsStyleEl = parentDiv?.previousElementSibling;
      if (itsStyleEl) {
        itsStyleEl.remove();
      }
      parentDiv?.remove();
    }
    const thisScript = document.currentScript;
    if (thisScript) {
      thisScript.remove();
    }
  }
}
  window.updateVisibilityStylesScript = function updateVisibilityStylesScript(variants, blockId, isHydrationTarget, locale) {
  function getCookie(name) {
    const nameEQ = name + '=';
    const ca = document.cookie.split(';');
    for (let i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
      let c = ca[i];
      while (c.charAt(0) == ' ') c = c.substring(1, c.length);
      if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) == 0) return c.substring(nameEQ.length, c.length);
    }
    return null;
  }
  const visibilityStylesEl = document.currentScript?.previousElementSibling;
  if (!visibilityStylesEl) {
    return;
  }
  if (isHydrationTarget) {
    visibilityStylesEl.remove();
    const currentScript = document.currentScript;
    if (currentScript) {
      currentScript.remove();
    }
  } else {
    const attributes = JSON.parse(getCookie('builder.userAttributes') || '{}');
    if (locale) {
      attributes.locale = locale;
    }
    const winningVariantIndex = variants?.findIndex(function (variant) {
      return window.filterWithCustomTargeting(attributes, variant.query, variant.startDate, variant.endDate);
    });
    if (winningVariantIndex !== -1) {
      let newStyleStr = variants?.map((_, index) => {
        if (index === winningVariantIndex) return '';
        return `div[data-variant-id="${blockId}-${index}"] { display: none !important; } `;
      }).join('') || '';
      newStyleStr += `div[data-variant-id="${blockId}-default"] { display: none !important; } `;
      visibilityStylesEl.innerHTML = newStyleStr;
    }
  }
}

    max-width: 100%;

    display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
position: relative;
flex-shrink: 0;
box-sizing: border-box;
padding-top: 20px;
  }    </style><div builder-id="builder-3f2fcda64b4f41ec855ece3ab01ca418" class="builder-3f2fcda64b4f41ec855ece3ab01ca418 builder-block"><style data-id="builderio-block" nonce="">.builder-9c16cdf55ff44a3487d418c77bd8a2e5 {
    color: rgba(74, 74, 74, 1);
font-size: 16px;
font-weight: 400;
line-height: 24px;
margin-top: 10px;
width: 100%;
align-self: stretch;
  } @media (max-width: 991px) {
      .builder-9c16cdf55ff44a3487d418c77bd8a2e5 {
    max-width: 100%;
  }
    }   </style><div builder-id="builder-9c16cdf55ff44a3487d418c77bd8a2e5" class="builder-9c16cdf55ff44a3487d418c77bd8a2e5 builder-block"><div class="builder-text" style="outline:none"><p>This hackathon focuses on one of the most critical challenges in AI today: <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">enabling agents to operate with verifiable trust and real financial capability.</strong></p><p><br></p><p>Participants will build <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">AI trading and financial agents</strong> that can:&nbsp;</p><ol><li>1. Safely interact with capital</li><li>2. Execute strategies</li><li>3. Demonstrate transparent behavior.&nbsp;</li></ol><p><br></p><p>This hackathon has two challenges: teams can <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">enter one</strong><strong>, </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">the other</strong><strong>, </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">or combine both into a single submission</strong><strong>.</strong></p><p><br></p><p>Build autonomous trading agents using <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Kraken CLI</strong>, the AI-native command-line interface for programmatic trading, or leverage<span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"> </span><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">ERC-8004 registries</strong> to establish agent identity, reputation, and validation signals for trustless financial agents. Winners can emerge from <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">either challenge or a combined submission</strong><strong>.</strong></p><p><br></p><p>Builders will work with production-style infrastructure, capital sandboxes, and risk controls, enabling them to move beyond demos and toward deployable AI trading agents.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p></div></div></div></div></div></div></section><!--/$--></div><style data-id="builderio-block" nonce="">.builder-12ed0b1696bd47d18abf2f6d8ba17268 {

      .builder-a342948815614ade80840743781abe4f {

  }
    }   </style><div builder-id="builder-a342948815614ade80840743781abe4f" class="builder-a342948815614ade80840743781abe4f builder-block"><div class="builder-text" style="outline:none"><font face="DM Sans, sans-serif" style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">Challenge</font></div></div></div></div><style data-id="builderio-block" nonce="">.builder-fc1fb24fd0f240ae905c62c1f3819b5e {
    display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
position: relative;
flex-shrink: 0;
box-sizing: border-box;
line-height: 24px;
height: auto;
color: rgba(74, 74, 74, 1);
margin-top: 24px;
font-size: 16px;
  }    </style><div builder-id="builder-fc1fb24fd0f240ae905c62c1f3819b5e" class="builder-fc1fb24fd0f240ae905c62c1f3819b5e builder-block"><div class="builder-text" style="outline:none"><p>Build an AI agent that performs a real financial function (trade, manage risk, optimize yield, or protect capital.</p><p><br></p><p>This hackathon has <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">two equal challenges</strong>. Teams can choose to enter one or both. Winners can come from either challenge or a combined submission.</p><p><br></p><h3><strong>🎯 </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Kraken Challenge</strong></h3><p>Build an autonomous trading agent that:</p><p><br></p><ul><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>Uses Kraken CLI to retrieve market data and execute trades</li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>Implements AI-driven strategies that analyze signals and trade programmatically</li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>Shares development progress publicly as part of the hackathon build-in-public culture</li></ul><p><br></p><p>Trading agents will be ranked based on <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">net PnL performance during the competition period</strong>.</p><p><br></p><p>⭐ The Kraken Challenge includes <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">additional prizes</strong> on top of the main hackathon prizes.</p><p><br></p><h3><strong>🔗 </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">ERC-8004 Challenge</strong></h3><p>Build a trustless trading or financial agent that:</p><p><br></p><ul><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">•&nbsp;</span>Registers identity on the ERC-8004 Identity Registry</li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">•&nbsp;</span>Accumulates measurable reputation from objective outcomes</li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">•&nbsp;</span>Produces validation artifacts for key actions, trade intents, risk checks, strategy checkpoints</li></ul><p><br></p><p>The agent must operate through the Hackathon Capital Sandbox provided vault and risk router so performance can be measured on-chain in stablecoin terms.</p><p><br></p><p>Rankings are based on risk-adjusted profitability, drawdown control, and validation quality, not just raw PnL.</p><p><br></p><h3><strong>🤝 </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Combining Both Challenges</strong></h3><p>Teams are encouraged to combine both challenges into a single submission. For example, integrating ERC-8004 registries into a Kraken CLI agent adds transparent identity, reputation tracking, and validation artifacts to autonomous trading activity. Combined submissions are eligible for prizes from both challenges.</p><p><br></p><h3><strong>⚠️ </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Important</strong><strong>: </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Prize Eligibility Requirement</strong></h3><p>Your team should have registered the project at <a href="https://early.surge.xyz" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">https://early.surge.xyz</a> in order to be eligible for the prize.</p><p><br></p><h3><strong>🔑</strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"> Access to early.surge.xyz</strong></h3><p>If prompted for login credentials, use:</p><p><br></p><ul><li><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Username</strong><strong>:</strong> admin</li></ul><h3><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Password</strong><strong>:</strong> JBRv2xWG7AzwVrLz88</h3><blockquote><br></blockquote><h3><br></h3></div></div><style data-id="builderio-block" nonce="">.builder-a0b91e9f30cc425488399a986d4b14c5 {
    display: none;
flex-direction: column;
position: relative;
flex-shrink: 0;
box-sizing: border-box;
line-height: 24px;
height: auto;
color: rgba(74, 74, 74, 1);
margin-top: 24px;
font-size: 16px;
  }    </style><div builder-id="builder-a0b91e9f30cc425488399a986d4b14c5" class="builder-a0b91e9f30cc425488399a986d4b14c5 builder-block"><div class="builder-text" style="outline:none"><p><span style="font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>Your mission</strong></span><span style="color: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit;"> is to </span><span style="font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>build and launch an AI-native product using X402 Payments&nbsp;</strong></span><span style="color: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit;">- a programmable payments infrastructure designed for the next generation of agentic and automated economies.</span></p><p><br></p><p>In this edition of <span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>Launch &amp; Fund Your Startup</strong></span>, you’ll have <span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>6 days</strong></span> to validate an idea, build a working prototype, and present a credible path toward real users and on-chain revenue.</p><p>This challenge is open to <span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>everyone&nbsp;</strong></span>- from early-stage founders to existing startups looking to expand or pivot their products.</p><p><font><span><br>Your submission should clearly show how your solution integrates or reimagines <span data-start="1119" data-end="1136" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>X402 Payments</strong></span> in the context of real-world financial interaction<br><br></span></font></p><h3 data-start="675" data-end="709" class="" style="--tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; Each track explores a core use case of programmable payments in the age of agentic systems:</span><strong style="font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"></strong></p></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></h3><span><span><p></p><span style="line-height: 23px;"><span style="line-height: 22px;"><span style="line-height: 21px;"><span style="line-height: 20px;"><span style="line-height: 19px;"><span style="line-height: 18px;"><span style="line-height: 17px;"><span style="line-height: 16px;"><span style="line-height: 15px;"><span style="line-height: 14px;"><span style="line-height: 13px;"><span style="line-height: 12px;"><span style="line-height: 11px;"><span style="line-height: 12px;"><p><br></p><h3 data-start="971" data-end="1003"></h3></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span><h3 data-start="971" data-end="1003"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>🤖 Agent-to-Agent Payments</strong></span></h3><p data-start="1004" data-end="1256"><span data-start="1004" data-end="1018" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>Challenge</strong></span><span data-start="1004" data-end="1018">:</span> Build a system where two or more agents autonomously trigger and settle payments—e.g., for usage-based services, access control, or dynamic pricing. Your product should demonstrate a working agentic payment loop with minimal human input.<br></p><br><hr data-start="1258" data-end="1261" style="max-height: 1000px;"><h3 data-start="1263" data-end="1295"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong><br>🧑‍💼Consumer AI Payments</strong></span></h3><p data-start="1296" data-end="1555"><span data-start="1296" data-end="1310" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>Challenge</strong></span><span data-start="1296" data-end="1310">:</span> Develop an AI assistant that can make payments on a user’s behalf—with built-in rules like spending limits, approval checkpoints, or identity verification (KYC/AML). Showcase how your product handles decision-making, compliance, and safeguards.<br></p><br><hr data-start="1557" data-end="1560" style="max-height: 1000px;"><h3 data-start="1562" data-end="1594"><br>🏢 <span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>B2B FinOps &amp; Compliance</strong></span></h3><p data-start="1595" data-end="1841"><span data-start="1595" data-end="1609" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>Challenge</strong></span><span data-start="1595" data-end="1609">:</span> Build a tool for businesses to manage real-time payments and financial operations—like tracking cash flow, enforcing policies, or generating audit-ready records. Highlight automation, accuracy, and visibility into payment activity.</p><br><hr data-start="1843" data-end="1846" style="max-height: 1000px;"><h3 data-start="1848" data-end="1885"><br>🛒<span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong> On-chain Commerce Primitives</strong></span></h3><p style="--tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-slashed-zero: ; --tw-numeric-figure: ; --tw-numeric-spacing: ; --tw-numeric-fraction: ; --tw-ring-inset: ; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-color: rgba(59,130,246,.5); --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000; --tw-blur: ; --tw-brightness: ; --tw-contrast: ; --tw-grayscale: ; --tw-hue-rotate: ; --tw-invert: ; --tw-saturate: ; --tw-sepia: ; --tw-drop-shadow: ; --tw-backdrop-blur: ; --tw-backdrop-brightness: ; --tw-backdrop-contrast: ; --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ; --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ; --tw-backdrop-invert: ; --tw-backdrop-opacity: ; --tw-backdrop-saturate: ; --tw-backdrop-sepia: ; --tw-contain-size: ; --tw-contain-layout: ; --tw-contain-paint: ; --tw-contain-style: ;">










</p><p data-start="1886" data-end="2133"><span data-start="1886" data-end="1900"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>Challenge</strong></span>:</span> Launch a digital product or service with a built-in revenue model using X402.   } @media (max-width: 991px) {

    font-family: "inter lablab Bold (700)", sans-serif;

  }
    } @media (max-width: 640px) {

    font-size: 30px;

  }
    }  </style><div builder-id="builder-7396a2e67ddd4a0a8b7f090a850bb07c" class="builder-7396a2e67ddd4a0a8b7f090a850bb07c builder-block"><div class="builder-text" style="outline:none"><h1><strong>Technology &amp; Access</strong></h1></div></div><style data-id="builderio-block" nonce="">.builder-5f7b56020f524a13b8b46b1f736d68e3 {
    display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
position: relative;
flex-shrink: 0;
box-sizing: border-box;
line-height: 24px;
height: auto;
color: rgba(74, 74, 74, 1);
margin-top: 10px;
font-size: 16px;
  } @media (max-width: 991px) {
      .builder-5f7b56020f524a13b8b46b1f736d68e3 {
    margin-top: 20px;
  }
    }   </style><div builder-id="builder-5f7b56020f524a13b8b46b1f736d68e3" class="builder-5f7b56020f524a13b8b46b1f736d68e3 builder-block"><div class="builder-text" style="outline:none"><p>This hackathon has<span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"> </span><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">two</strong> equal challenges. Teams may enter one or both. Below are the technical requirements for each.</p><p><br></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Required technology</strong><strong>:</strong></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>Kraken CLI: a zero-dependency Rust binary with built-in MCP server and full Kraken API connectivity</p><ul><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>A read-only Kraken API key linked to your trading account (for leaderboard verification, no withdrawal access required)</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">How to get started</strong><strong>:</strong></p><ol><li>1. Install Kraken CLI from the official repository</li><li>2. Configure API access and connect it to your agent</li><li>3. Build your agent: implement an autonomous workflow where your AI analyzes market signals and executes trades programmatically through Kraken CLI</li><li>4. Share your progress publicly as part of the Social Engagement challenge</li></ol><p><br></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Resources</strong><strong>:</strong></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://github.com/krakenfx/kraken-cli" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>Kraken CLI GitHub repository</u></a></p><ul><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://blog.kraken.com/news/industry-news/announcing-the-kraken-cli" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>Kraken CLI announcement</u></a></li></ul><p><br></p><h3><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">ERC-8004 Challenge: Technology &amp; Access</strong></h3><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Required technology</strong><strong>:</strong><strong style="font-size: 16px;">﻿</strong></p><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>ERC-8004 registries for Agent Identity, Reputation, and Validation. Deploy on an L2 or testnet (mainnet optional)</p><ul><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>EIP-712 typed data signatures for trade intents and attestations</li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>EIP-1271 support for smart-contract wallets; EIP-155 chain-id binding</li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>DEX execution via a whitelisted Risk Router contract (hackathon-provided — e.g., Uniswap-style routers)</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">How to access the infrastructure</strong><strong>:</strong></p><ol><li><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">1. Register your agent</strong><strong>:</strong> Mint and register an Agent Identity (ERC-721) pointing to your Agent Registration JSON, capabilities, endpoints, and agent wallet</li><li><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">2. Claim sandbox capita</strong><strong>l:</strong> Each team receives a funded sub-account in the Hackathon Capital Vault (test funds by default; optional small real-capital pool for finals)</li><li><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">3. Execute via Risk Router</strong><strong>:</strong> Agents submit signed TradeIntents. The Risk Router enforces position size limits, max leverage, whitelisted markets, and daily loss limits</li><li><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">4. Record trust signals</strong><strong>:</strong> Every trade and checkpoint emits on-chain events. Validators post scores to the Validation Registry. PnL signals and validator scores feed agent's reputation</li><li><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">5. Leaderboard</strong><strong>:</strong> lablab.ai publishes a transparent leaderboard tracking PnL, Sharpe ratio, drawdown, and validation score</li></ol><p><br></p><h3 style="--tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-slashed-zero: ; --tw-numeric-figure: ; --tw-numeric-spacing: ; --tw-numeric-fraction: ; --tw-ring-inset: ; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-color: rgba(59,130,246,.5); --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000; --tw-blur: ; --tw-brightness: ; --tw-contrast: ; --tw-grayscale: ; --tw-hue-rotate: ; --tw-invert: ; --tw-saturate: ; --tw-sepia: ; --tw-drop-shadow: ; --tw-backdrop-blur: ; --tw-backdrop-brightness: ; --tw-backdrop-contrast: ; --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ; --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ; --tw-backdrop-invert: ; --tw-backdrop-opacity: ; --tw-backdrop-saturate: ; --tw-backdrop-sepia: ; --tw-contain-size: ; --tw-contain-layout: ; --tw-contain-paint: ; --tw-contain-style: ;">📘<strong style="font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Resources</strong><strong style="color: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit;">:</strong></h3><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>EIP-8004 Specification</u></a></p><ul><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/erc-8004-trustless-agents/25098" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>ERC-8004 forum discussion</u></a></li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://medium.com/@savvysid/erc-8004-building-the-trustless-agent-layer-of-ethereum-0eec8b9ad112" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>Developer walkthrough article (Solidity + JS examples)</u></a></li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://github.com/sudeepb02/awesome-erc8004" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>Optional Curated Resources</u></a></li></ul><p><br></p><h3><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Optional Enhancements (for either or both challenges)</strong></h3><p>These are not required, but can strengthen any submission:</p><ul><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>TEE-backed attestations or verifiable execution proofs (e.g., TEE oracle; zkML validation)</li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>Off-chain indexers or subgraphs for discovery dashboards and leaderboards</li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span>Portfolio risk modules (limits, circuit breakers, stop-loss policies) enforced on-chain</li></ul></div></div></div></div></section><!--/$--></div><style data-id="builderio-block" nonce="">.builder-6b8b73ad40884d4dba850150037a1f76 {

    <b><font face="__Inter_aaf875, __Inter_Fallback_aaf875, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji">Technology&nbsp;Partners&nbsp;</font></b>
</h1>
</div></div><style data-id="builderio-block" nonce="">.builder-22d126c0453a43409792e6b7ddb44f6c {

  }    </style><div builder-id="builder-22d126c0453a43409792e6b7ddb44f6c" class="builder-22d126c0453a43409792e6b7ddb44f6c builder-block"><style>.img-3cc22d08 {
  opacity: 1;
  transition: opacity 0.2s ease-in-out;

}</style><picture><img loading="lazy" fetchPriority="auto" role="presentation" style="object-position:center;object-fit:cover;position:absolute;height:100%;width:100%;left:0px;top:0px" class="builder-image img-3cc22d08" src="https://cdn.builder.io/api/v1/image/assets%2F972274c44a2d4c658b0fa440848d24a1%2F3fb5f0e0a3814104b325c5fa3d61c4c1?width=255" sizes="(max-width: 638px) 40vw, (max-width: 998px) 26vw, 19vw"/></picture><div class="builder-image-sizer div-3cc22d08" style="padding-top:16%"></div></div><style data-id="builderio-block" nonce="">.builder-2156d7de82b44dfaac2f53ec17b2e64e {
    display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
position: relative;
flex-shrink: 0;
box-sizing: border-box;
line-height: 24px;
height: auto;
color: rgba(74, 74, 74, 1);
margin-top: 10px;
font-size: 16px;
  } @media (max-width: 991px) {
      .builder-2156d7de82b44dfaac2f53ec17b2e64e {
    margin-top: 20px;
  }
    }   </style><div builder-id="builder-2156d7de82b44dfaac2f53ec17b2e64e" class="builder-2156d7de82b44dfaac2f53ec17b2e64e builder-block"><div class="builder-text" style="outline:none"><p><a href="https://www.kraken.com/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>Kraken</u></a><u> </u>provides one of the most established trading infrastructures in the crypto industry, supporting markets across crypto, forex, and derivatives. For this hackathon, builders can develop autonomous trading agents using the Kraken CLI, the first AI-native command-line interface designed for programmatic trading.</p><p><br></p><p><a href="https://github.com/krakenfx/kraken-cli" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>Kraken CLI </u></a>is a zero-dependency Rust binary that provides direct access to Kraken trading infrastructure. It ships with a built-in Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, full Kraken API connectivity, and a local paper-trading sandbox for testing strategies. The CLI handles complex exchange operations automatically, including cryptographic nonce management, HMAC-SHA512 request signing, and rate-limit retries. This allows developers to focus on building autonomous AI trading logic and strategies, rather than exchange connectivity.</p><p><br></p><h2><strong>🏆 </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Kraken Challenge</strong><strong>: </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Evaluation</strong></h2><p>Agents in the Kraken Challenge are evaluated across<strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"> two </strong>independent categories.</p><p><br></p><h3><strong>1️⃣ </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Trading Performance (PnL)</strong></h3><p>Agents are ranked purely by net PnL (realized + unrealized) over the competition period.</p><p><br></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">How it works</strong><strong>:</strong></p><p><strong style="font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="color: rgb(74, 74, 74);">•</span><span style="color: rgb(74, 74, 74);">&nbsp;</span>Submission</strong><strong style="color: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit;">:</strong><span style="color: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit;"> Each participant provides a read-only Kraken API key linked to their trading account. This allows lablab.ai and Kraken to view trade history — no execution or withdrawal access is granted.</span></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="color: rgb(74, 74, 74); font-weight: 400;">•&nbsp;</span>Verification</strong><strong>:</strong> lablab.ai maintains a live leaderboard tracking performance in real time.</p><ul><li><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="color: rgb(74, 74, 74); font-weight: 400;">•&nbsp;</span>Audit</strong><strong>:</strong> Kraken performs a final audit on top agents before prizes are distributed.</li><li><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="color: rgb(74, 74, 74); font-weight: 400;">•&nbsp;</span>Ranking</strong><strong>:</strong> Winners are determined solely by net PnL at the end of the competition window.</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Requirements</strong><strong>:</strong></p><ul><li>Agents must use Kraken CLI as the execution layer</li><li>One submission per participant or team</li></ul><p><br></p><h3><strong>2️⃣ </strong><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Social Engagement</strong></h3><p>Build in public. Share your journey. Inspire the community.</p><p><br></p><p>Over a 30-day window, participants earn a Social Engagement Score based purely on quantitative metrics from public platforms: Twitter/X, YouTube, blogs, or other channels.</p><p><br></p><h3><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">How Winners are Determined</strong>:</h3><h3>lablab.ai tracks engagement metrics: impressions, likes, shares, and reach across linked social accounts</h3><ul><li>Rankings are determined purely by quantitative data: no subjective judging</li><li>Participants can monitor their position throughout the competition window</li></ul><p><br></p><h3>📣 <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">When Posting, Tag:</strong></h3><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Kraken</strong></p><ul><li>X: <a href="https://x.com/krakenfx" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">@krakenfx</a></li><li>IG<strong>:</strong><a href="https://www.instagram.com/krakenfx/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">@krakenfx</a></li><li>LI<strong>: </strong><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/krakenfx/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">Kraken</a></li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">LabLab</strong></p><ul><li>X: <a href="https://x.com/lablabai" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">@lablabai</a></li><li>IG<strong>: </strong><a href="https://www.instagram.com/lablab.ai/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">@lablab.ai</a></li><li>LI<strong>: </strong><a href="about:blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">lablab.ai</a></li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Surge</strong></p><ul><li>X: <a href="https://x.com/Surgexyz_" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">@Surgexyz_</a></li><li>LI: <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/surgexyz/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">Surge.xyz</a></li></ul><p><br></p><h2>🚀 <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">How to Get Started</strong></h2><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Kraken Challenge</strong><strong>:</strong></p><ol><li>1. Install the Kraken CLI from the official repository</li><li>2. Configure your Kraken API access and connect it to your agent</li><li>3. Build an autonomous AI trading agent that analyzes signals and executes trades through Kraken CLI</li><li>4. Share your progress publicly as part of the Social Engagement challenge</li></ol><p><br></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">ERC-8004 Challenge</strong><strong>:</strong></p><ol><li>1. Register your agent identity on the ERC-8004 Identity Registry</li><li>2. Claim your sandbox capital from the Hackathon Capital Vault</li><li>3. Build your trustless trading or financial agent operating through the Risk Router</li><li>4. Record trust signals and compete on the on-chain leaderboard</li></ol><p><br></p><p><strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Combining both</strong><strong>?</strong> Start with either challenge, then layer in the other for a combined submission eligible for prizes from both.</p><p><br></p><h2>📘 <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Resources</strong></h2><ul><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://github.com/krakenfx/kraken-cli" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>Kraken CLI GitHub Repository</u></a></li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://blog.kraken.com/news/industry-news/announcing-the-kraken-cli" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>Kraken CLI Announcement</u></a></li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>EIP-8004 Specification</u></a></li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/erc-8004-trustless-agents/25098" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>ERC-8004 forum discussion</u></a></li><li><span style="font-size: 16px;">• </span><a href="https://medium.com/@savvysid/erc-8004-building-the-trustless-agent-layer-of-ethereum-0eec8b9ad112" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>Developer walkthrough article (Solidity + JS examples)</u></a><u style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">&nbsp;</u></li></ul><p><br></p></div></div><style data-id="builderio-block" nonce="">.builder-9d6dbfd9e40e4e5e825857efd87cba0e {

  }
    } @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .builder-72878f02a1b94849aeedb660470fd319 {
    line-height: 30px;
  }
    }  </style><div builder-id="builder-72878f02a1b94849aeedb660470fd319" class="builder-72878f02a1b94849aeedb660470fd319 builder-block"><div class="builder-text" style="outline:none"><p>
  <a href="https://strykr.ai/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>Strykr</u> </a>is an agent-first market intelligence and execution platform that enables developers, traders, and AI systems to access and act on real-time financial data across all markets.
</p>
<p>
  At its core is <a href="https://www.prismapi.ai/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><u>PRISM</u></a
  >, a canonical asset resolution engine that maps any ticker, symbol, or contract address across crypto, equities, forex, commodities, and more into a single persistent identity. PRISM continuously learns from usage, ensuring new or obscure assets are instantly resolvable.
</p>
<p>
  <br />
</p>
<p>The platform combines:</p>
<p>&nbsp;• Real-time market data (20+ sources)</p>
<p>&nbsp;• AI-powered signals and analysis</p>
<p>&nbsp;• Execution integrations via deep links (perps, DEXs, brokers)</p>
<p>&nbsp;• A developer-ready API (244 endpoints, sub-100ms latency)</p>
<p><br /></p>
<p>Strykr enables a full workflow from intent → insight → execution, making it possible for both humans and autonomous agents to trade and analyze markets in one unified system.</p>
<ul></ul>
<p><br /></p>
<h3 data-section-id="1kqtusf" data-start="618" data-end="644" style="--tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-slashed-zero: ; --tw-numeric-figure: ; --tw-numeric-spacing: ; --tw-numeric-fraction: ; --tw-ring-inset: ; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-color: rgba(59,130,246,.5); --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000; --tw-blur: ; --tw-brightness: ; --tw-contrast: ; --tw-grayscale: ; --tw-hue-rotate: ; --tw-invert: ; --tw-saturate: ; --tw-sepia: ; --tw-drop-shadow: ; --tw-backdrop-blur: ; --tw-backdrop-brightness: ; --tw-backdrop-contrast: ; --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ; --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ; --tw-backdrop-invert: ; --tw-backdrop-opacity: ; --tw-backdrop-saturate: ; --tw-backdrop-sepia: ; --tw-contain-size: ; --tw-contain-layout: ; --tw-contain-paint: ; --tw-contain-style: ;">
  <span style="--tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-slashed-zero: ; --tw-numeric-figure: ; --tw-numeric-spacing: ; --tw-numeric-fraction: ; --tw-ring-inset: ; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-color: rgba(59,130,246,.5); --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000; --tw-blur: ; --tw-brightness: ; --tw-contrast: ; --tw-grayscale: ; --tw-hue-rotate: ; --tw-invert: ; --tw-saturate: ; --tw-sepia: ; --tw-drop-shadow: ; --tw-backdrop-blur: ; --tw-backdrop-brightness: ; --tw-backdrop-contrast: ; --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ; --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ; --tw-backdrop-invert: ; --tw-backdrop-opacity: ; --tw-backdrop-saturate: ; --tw-backdrop-sepia: ; --tw-contain-size: ; --tw-contain-layout: ; --tw-contain-paint: ; --tw-contain-style: ; font-size: 17px;"
    ><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: bolder;">Access to Technology</span
    ><span data-start="150" data-end="174" style="font-size: 16px;"
      ><br />The <strong data-start="1102" data-end="1128" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">first 500 participants</strong><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"> </span><span>will receive</span><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"> </span><strong data-start="1142" data-end="1182" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">$10 in free API credits (~15K calls)</strong><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">, </span><span>plus access to PRISM’s multi-asset market and signals API. Total credits available:</span><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"> </span><strong data-start="1268" data-end="1278" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">$5,000</strong><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">.<br /><br /></span></span
  ></span>
</h3>
<p data-start="1283" data-end="1324" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-size: medium; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; text-align: start;"><strong data-start="1283" data-end="1322">How to get started (2–3 min setup):</strong></p>
<ol data-start="1325" data-end="1466" style="font-size: medium;">
  <li data-section-id="1x4lj3j" data-start="1325" data-end="1375">
    1. Sign up at <a href="http://prismapi.ai/" target="_blank"><u style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">prismapi.ai</u></a
    ><a data-start="1339" data-end="1373" class="decorated-link" rel="noopener" target="_new" href="https://prismapi.ai"
      ></a>
  </li>
  <li data-section-id="8bebyo" data-start="1376" data-end="1404">2. Redeem code: <strong data-start="1392" data-end="1402" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">LABLAB</strong></li>
  <li data-section-id="c91vts" data-start="1405" data-end="1446">3. Create your API key (<code data-start="1429" data-end="1443">prism_sk_...</code>)</li>
  <li data-section-id="fidxpx" data-start="1447" data-end="1466">4. <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Test your key:</strong></li>
</ol>
<p data-start="786" data-end="810" style="--tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-slashed-zero: ; --tw-numeric-figure: ; --tw-numeric-spacing: ; --tw-numeric-fraction: ; --tw-ring-inset: ; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-color: rgba(59,130,246,.5); --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000; --tw-blur: ; --tw-brightness: ; --tw-contrast: ; --tw-grayscale: ; --tw-hue-rotate: ; --tw-invert: ; --tw-saturate: ; --tw-sepia: ; --tw-drop-shadow: ; --tw-backdrop-blur: ; --tw-backdrop-brightness: ; --tw-backdrop-contrast: ; --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ; --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ; --tw-backdrop-invert: ; --tw-backdrop-opacity: ; --tw-backdrop-saturate: ; --tw-backdrop-sepia: ; --tw-contain-size: ; --tw-contain-layout: ; --tw-contain-paint: ; --tw-contain-style: ; text-align: start;">
  <span data-start="786" data-end="808" style="--tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-slashed-zero: ; --tw-numeric-figure: ; --tw-numeric-spacing: ; --tw-numeric-fraction: ; --tw-ring-inset: ; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-color: rgba(59,130,246,.5); --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000; --tw-blur: ; --tw-brightness: ; --tw-contrast: ; --tw-grayscale: ; --tw-hue-rotate: ; --tw-invert: ; --tw-saturate: ; --tw-sepia: ; --tw-drop-shadow: ; --tw-backdrop-blur: ; --tw-backdrop-brightness: ; --tw-backdrop-contrast: ; --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ; --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ; --tw-backdrop-invert: ; --tw-backdrop-opacity: ; --tw-backdrop-saturate: ; --tw-backdrop-sepia: ; --tw-contain-size: ; --tw-contain-layout: ; --tw-contain-paint: ; --tw-contain-style: ;"
    ><font
      ><span
        >curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" <a href="https://api.prismapi.ai/resolve/BTC" target="_blank"><u style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">https://api.prismapi.ai/resolve/BTC</u></a
        ><br /><br /></span></font
  ></span>
</p>
<p data-start="1546" data-end="1723">
  <strong data-start="1546" data-end="1569" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">What you can build:</strong><br data-start="1569" data-end="1572" />
  • Trading agents (signals, risk, technicals)<br data-start="1616" data-end="1619" />
  • Market dashboards (crypto, stocks, ETFs)<br data-start="1661" data-end="1664" />
  • On-chain + DEX analytics<br data-start="1690" data-end="1693" />
  • Prediction/odds-based apps<br /><br />
</p>
<p data-start="1725" data-end="1928">
  <strong data-start="1725" data-end="1747" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Key API endpoints:</strong><br data-start="1747" data-end="1750" />
  • <code data-start="1752" data-end="1770">/resolve/{asset}</code> → universal asset identity<br data-start="1797" data-end="1800" />
  • <code data-start="1802" data-end="1826">/crypto/{symbol}/price</code> → real-time prices<br data-start="1845" data-end="1848" />
  • <code data-start="1850" data-end="1869">/signals/{symbol}</code> → AI signals<br data-start="1882" data-end="1885" />
  • <code data-start="1887" data-end="1903">/risk/{symbol}</code> → volatility + metrics
</p>

    line-height: 30px;

    }  </style><div builder-id="builder-14ba775b57554382bafe8cffa9d0dd4f" class="builder-14ba775b57554382bafe8cffa9d0dd4f builder-block"><div class="builder-text" style="outline:none"><p><a href="https://aerodrome.finance/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><u style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"></u></a></p><span style="font-size: 17px;"><span style="font-size: 16px;"><span style="line-height: 28px;"><span style="line-height: 27px;"><span style="line-height: 26px;"><span style="line-height: 25px;"><span style="line-height: 24px;"><p><a href="https://aerodrome.finance/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><u style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">Aerodrome Finance</u> </a>is a decentralized liquidity marketplace designed to power efficient token trading and liquidity coordination on the <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Base ecosystem</strong>. Aerodrome combines automated market making, liquidity incentives, and governance to create a powerful platform where developers and users can<span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"> <strong>launch tokens, create liquidity pools, and coordinate on-chain markets</strong>.</span></p><p><br></p><p>With tools like <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Aerodrome Launcher</strong>, builders can easily create and bootstrap new tokens while integrating liquidity and market incentives from day one. This makes Aerodrome a strong foundation for projects that need <strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">on-chain trading infrastructure, liquidity coordination, and programmable financial flows</strong>.&nbsp;</p><h3><br></h3><h3>📘<strong style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Resources</strong></h3><p>•&nbsp;<span style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><a href="https://aerodrome.finance/docs" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><u>Aerodrome Documentation</u></a></span></p><p>•<span style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><a href="https://github.com/orgs/aerodrome-finance/repositories" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">&nbsp;</a><a href="https://github.com/orgs/aerodrome-finance/repositories" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><u>Aerodrome GitHub Repositories</u></a></span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><span style="color: rgb(74, 74, 74);">•</span>&nbsp;<a href="https://aerodrome.finance/docs/launcher" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><u>Aerodrome Launcher Overview</u></a></span></p></span></span></span></span></span></span></span><p><span style="color: rgb(74, 144, 226);"><a href="https://aerodrome.finance/docs/launcher" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><u></u></a></span></p></div></div><style data-id="builderio-block" nonce="">.builder-545e27e68c904e2b81389038a182df20 {

    <p style="border-image: initial; scrollbar-color: auto; scrollbar-width: auto; --tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-slashed-zero: ; --tw-numeric-figure: ; --tw-numeric-spacing: ; --tw-numeric-fraction: ; --tw-ring-inset: ; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-color: rgba(59,130,246,.5); --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000; --tw-blur: ; --tw-brightness: ; --tw-contrast: ; --tw-grayscale: ; --tw-hue-rotate: ; --tw-invert: ; --tw-saturate: ; --tw-sepia: ; --tw-drop-shadow: ; --tw-backdrop-blur: ; --tw-backdrop-brightness: ; --tw-backdrop-contrast: ; --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ; --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ; --tw-backdrop-invert: ; --tw-backdrop-opacity: ; --tw-backdrop-saturate: ; --tw-backdrop-sepia: ; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400;">
      <span></span
      ><span style="line-height: 2px;"
        ><span style="line-height: 24px;"><font color="#4a4a4a">To get ready for the hackathon, visit our</font>&nbsp;<a href="https://lablab.ai/tech" target="_blank"style="border-image: initial; scrollbar-color: auto; scrollbar-width: auto; --tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-slashed-zero: ; --tw-numeric-figure: ; --tw-numeric-spacing: ; --tw-numeric-fraction: ; --tw-ring-inset: ; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-color: rgba(59,130,246,.5); --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000; --tw-blur: ; --tw-brightness: ; --tw-contrast: ; --tw-grayscale: ; --tw-hue-rotate: ; --tw-invert: ; --tw-saturate: ; --tw-sepia: ; --tw-drop-shadow: ; --tw-backdrop-blur: ; --tw-backdrop-brightness: ; --tw-backdrop-contrast: ; --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ; --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ; --tw-backdrop-invert: ; --tw-backdrop-opacity: ; --tw-backdrop-saturate: ; --tw-backdrop-sepia: ; text-decoration: underline; color: rgb(74, 144, 226);">AI Tech</a>&nbsp;<font color="#4a4a4a">pages and read up on all the available technologies. Trading Agents\"}],[\"$\",\"meta\",\"7\",{\"property\":\"og:description\",\"content\":\"⏱️ Design, build, and deploy trustless AI trading agents. \\n\\n📅 March 30 – April 12, 2026  \\n\\n🌐 Build AI trading agents that execute strategies using ERC-8004 or  Kraken CLI.\\n\\n🤝 Build solo or in teams to create autonomous trading, risk, yield, or protection agents.\\n\\n💰 $55,000 prize pool, Demonstrate transparent behavior.\u0026nbsp;\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ol\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eThis hackathon has two challenges: teams can \u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eenter one\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e, \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003ethe other\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e, \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstr"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"ong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eor combine both into a single submission\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e.\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eBuild autonomous trading agents using \u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eKraken CLI\u003c/strong\u003e, the AI-native command-line interface for programmatic trading, or leverage\u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e \u003c/span\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eERC-8004 registries\u003c/strong\u003e to establish agent identity, reputation, and validation signals for trustless financial agents. Winners can emerge from \u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eeither challenge or a combined submission\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e.\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eBuilders will work with production-style infrastructure, capital sandboxes, and risk controls, enabling them to move beyond demos and toward deployable AI trading agents.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e1e:Tce2,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cp\u003eBuild an AI agent that performs a real financial function (trade, manage risk, optimize yield, or protect capital.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eThis hackathon has \u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003etwo equal challenges\u003c/strong\u003e. Teams can choose to enter one or both. Winners can come from either challenge or a combined submission.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🎯 \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eKraken Challenge\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp\u003eBuild an autonomous trading agent that:\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eUses Kraken CLI to retrieve market data and execute trades\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eImplements AI-driven strategies that analyze signals and trade programmatically\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eShares development progress publicly as part of the hackathon build-in-public culture\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eTrading agents will be ranked based on \u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003enet PnL performance during the competition period\u003c/strong\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e⭐ The Kraken Challenge includes \u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eadditional prizes\u003c/strong\u003e on top of the main hackathon prizes.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🔗 \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eERC-8004 Challenge\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp\u003eBuild a trustless trading or financial agent that:\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e•\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003eRegisters identity on the ERC-8004 Identity Registry\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e•\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003eAccumulates measurable reputation from objective outcomes\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e•\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003eProduces validation artifacts for key actions, trade intents, risk checks, strategy checkpoints\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eThe agent must operate through the Hackathon Capital Sandbox provided vault and risk router so performance can be measured on-chain in stablecoin terms.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eRankings are based on risk-adjusted profitability, drawdown control, and validation quality, not just raw PnL.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🤝 \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eCombining Both Challenges\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp\u003eTeams are encouraged to combine both challenges into a single submission. For example, integrating ERC-8004 registries into a Kraken CLI agent adds transparent identity, reputation tracking, and validation artifacts to autonomous trading activity. Combined submissions are eligible for prizes from both challenges.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e⚠️ \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eImportant\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e: \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003ePrize Eligibility Requirement\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp\u003eYour team should have registered the project at \u003ca href=\"https://early.surge.xyz\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003ehttps://early.surge.xyz\u003c/a\u003e in order to be eligible for the prize.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🔑\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e Access to early.surge.xyz\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp\u003eIf prompted for login credentials, use:\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eUsername\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e admin\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003ePassword\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e JBRv2xWG7AzwVrLz88\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cblockquote\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/blockquote\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"1f:T6b6c,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cp\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eTracks\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 24px;\"\u003eChoose one - or mix and match. Each track explores a core use case of programmable payments in the age of agentic systems:\u003c/span\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cspan\u003e\u003cspan\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 23px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 22px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 21px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 20px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 19px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 18px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 17px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 16px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 15px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 14px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 13px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 12px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 11px;\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"line-height: 12px;\"\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3 data-start=\"971\" data-end=\"1003\"\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003ch3 data-start=\"971\" data-end=\"1003\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🤖 Agent-to-Agent Payments\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp data-start=\"1004\" data-end=\"1256\"\u003e\u003cspan data-start=\"1004\" data-end=\"1018\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eChallenge\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan data-start=\"1004\" data-end=\"1018\"\u003e:\u003c/span\u003e Build a system where two or more agents autonomously trigger and settle payments—e.g., for usage-based services, access control, or dynamic pricing. Your product should demonstrate a working agentic payment loop with minimal human input.\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003chr data-start=\"1258\" data-end=\"1261\" style=\"max-height: 1000px;\"\u003e\u003ch3 data-start=\"1263\" data-end=\"1295\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e\u003cbr\u003e🧑‍💼Consumer AI Payments\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp data-start=\"1296\" data-end=\"1555\"\u003e\u003cspan data-start=\"1296\" data-end=\"1310\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eChallenge\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan data-start=\"1296\" data-end=\"1310\"\u003e:\u003c/span\u003e Develop an AI assistant that can make payments on a user’s behalf—with built-in rules like spending limits, approval checkpoints, or identity verification (KYC/AML). Showcase how your product handles decision-making, compliance, and safeguards.\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003chr data-start=\"1557\" data-end=\"1560\" style=\"max-height: 1000px;\"\u003e\u003ch3 data-start=\"1562\" data-end=\"1594\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e🏢 \u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eB2B FinOps \u0026amp; Compliance\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp data-start=\"1595\" data-end=\"1841\"\u003e\u003cspan data-start=\"1595\" data-end=\"1609\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eChallenge\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan data-start=\"1595\" data-end=\"1609\"\u003e:\u003c/span\u003e Build a tool for businesses to manage real-time payments and financial operations—like tracking cash flow, enforcing policies, or generating audit-ready records. Highlight automation, accuracy, and visibility into payment activity.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003chr data-start=\"1843\" data-end=\"1846\" style=\"max-height: 1000px;\"\u003e\u003ch3 data-start=\"1848\" data-end=\"1885\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e🛒\u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e On-chain Commerce Primitives\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp style=\"--tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-slashed-zero: ; --tw-numeric-figure: ; --tw-numeric-spacing: ; --tw-numeric-fraction: ; --tw-ring-inset: ; --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px; --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff; --tw-ring-color: rgba(59,130,246,.5); --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000; --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000; --tw-blur: ; --tw-brightness: ; --tw-contrast: ; --tw-grayscale: ; --tw-hue-rotate: ; --tw-invert: ; --tw-saturate: ; --tw-sepia: ; --tw-drop-shadow: ; --tw-backdrop-blur: ; --tw-backdrop-brightness: ; --tw-backdrop-contrast: ; --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ; --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ; --tw-backdrop-invert: ; --tw-backdrop-opacity: ; --tw-backdrop-saturate: ; --tw-backdrop-sepia: ; --tw-contain-size: ; --tw-contain-layout: ; --tw-contain-paint: ; --tw-contain-style: ;\"\u003e\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp data-start=\"1886\" data-end=\"2133\"\u003e\u003cspan data-start=\"1886\" data-end=\"1900\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eChallenge\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/span\u003e:\u003c/span\u003e Launch a digital product or service with a built-in revenue model using X402. Teams may enter one or both. Below are the technical requirements for each.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eRequired technology\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eKraken CLI: a zero-dependency Rust binary with built-in MCP server and full Kraken API connectivity\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eA read-only Kraken API key linked to your trading account (for leaderboard verification, no withdrawal access required)\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eHow to get started\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003col\u003e\u003cli\u003e1. Install Kraken CLI from the official repository\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e2. Configure API access and connect it to your agent\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e3. Build your agent: implement an autonomous workflow where your AI analyzes market signals and executes trades programmatically through Kraken CLI\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e4. Share your progress publicly as part of the Social Engagement challenge\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ol\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eResources\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/krakenfx/kraken-cli\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003e\u003cu\u003eKraken CLI GitHub repository\u003c/u\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://blog.kraken.com/news/industry-news/announcing-the-kraken-cli\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003e\u003cu\u003eKraken CLI announcement\u003c/u\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eERC-8004 Challenge: Technology \u0026amp; Access\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eRequired technology\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e﻿\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eERC-8004 registries for Agent Identity, Reputation, and Validation. Deploy on an L2 or testnet (mainnet optional)\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eEIP-712 typed data signatures for trade intents and attestations\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eEIP-1271 support for smart-contract wallets; EIP-155 chain-id binding\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eDEX execution via a whitelisted Risk Router contract (hackathon-provided — e.g., Uniswap-style routers)\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eHow to access the infrastructure\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003col\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e1. Register your agent\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e Mint and register an Agent Identity (ERC-721) pointing to your Agent Registration JSON, capabilities, endpoints, and agent wallet\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e2. Claim sandbox capita\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003el:\u003c/strong\u003e Each team receives a funded sub-account in the Hackathon Capital Vault (test funds by default; optional small real-capital pool for finals)\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e3. Execute via Risk Router\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e Agents submit signed TradeIntents. The Risk Router enforces position size limits, max leverage, whitelisted markets, and daily loss limits\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e4. Record trust signals\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e Every trade and checkpoint emits on-chain events. Validators post scores to the Validation Registry. PnL signals and validator scores feed agent's reputation\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e5. Leaderboard\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e lablab.ai publishes a transparent leaderboard tracking PnL, Sharpe ratio, drawdown, and validation score\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ol\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3 style=\"--tw-scale-x: 1;
