letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit;\"\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003e\u003cu\u003eEIP-8004 Specification\u003c/u\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/erc-8004-trustless-agents/25098\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003e\u003cu\u003eERC-8004 forum discussion\u003c/u\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://medium.com/@savvysid/erc-8004-building-the-trustless-agent-layer-of-ethereum-0eec8b9ad112\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003e\u003cu\u003eDeveloper walkthrough article (Solidity + JS examples)\u003c/u\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/sudeepb02/awesome-erc8004\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003e\u003cu\u003eOptional Curated Resources\u003c/u\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eOptional Enhancements (for either or both challenges)\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp\u003eThese are not required, but can strengthen any submission:\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eTEE-backed attestations or verifiable execution proofs (e.g., TEE oracle; zkML validation)\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003eOff-chain indexers or subgraphs for discovery dashboards and leaderboards\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cspan style=\"font-size: 16px;\"\u003e• \u003c/span\u003ePortfolio risk modules (limits, circuit breakers, stop-loss policies) enforced on-chain\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"21:T1fa6,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cp\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.kraken.com/\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003e\u003cu\u003eKraken\u003c/u\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cu\u003e \u003c/u\u003eprovides one of the most established trading infrastructures in the crypto industry, supporting markets across crypto, forex, and derivatives. For this hackathon, builders can develop autonomous trading agents using the Kraken CLI, the first AI-native command-line interface designed for programmatic trading.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/krakenfx/kraken-cli\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003e\u003cu\u003eKraken CLI \u003c/u\u003e\u003c/a\u003eis a zero-dependency Rust binary that provides direct access to Kraken trading infrastructure. It ships with a built-in Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, full Kraken API connectivity, and a local paper-trading sandbox for testing strategies. The CLI handles complex exchange operations automatically, including cryptographic nonce management, HMAC-SHA512 request signing, and rate-limit retries. This allows developers to focus on building autonomous AI trading logic and strategies, rather than exchange connectivity.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch2\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e🏆 \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eKraken Challenge\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e: \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eEvaluation\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eAgents in the Kraken Challenge are evaluated across\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e two \u003c/strong\u003eindependent categories.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e1️⃣ \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eTrading Performance (PnL)\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp\u003eAgents are ranked purely by net PnL (realized + unrealized) over the competition period.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eHow it works\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(74, 74, 74);\"\u003e•\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(74, 74, 74);\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003eSubmission\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit;\"\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; text-align: inherit;\"\u003e Each participant provides a read-only Kraken API key linked to their trading account. This allows lablab.ai and Kraken to view trade history — no execution or withdrawal access is granted.\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(74, 74, 74); font-weight: 400;\"\u003e•\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003eVerification\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e lablab.ai maintains a live leaderboard tracking performance in real time.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(74, 74, 74); font-weight: 400;\"\u003e•\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003eAudit\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e Kraken performs a final audit on top agents before prizes are distributed.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color: rgb(74, 74, 74); font-weight: 400;\"\u003e•\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003eRanking\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e Winners are determined solely by net PnL at the end of the competition window.\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eRequirements\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003eAgents must use Kraken CLI as the execution layer\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eOne submission per participant or team\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e2️⃣ \u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eSocial Engagement\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cp\u003eBuild in public. Share your journey. Inspire the community.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eOver a 30-day window, participants earn a Social Engagement Score based purely on quantitative metrics from public platforms: Twitter/X, YouTube, blogs, or other channels.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eHow Winners are Determined\u003c/strong\u003e:\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ch3\u003elablab.ai tracks engagement metrics: impressions, likes, shares, and reach across linked social accounts\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003eRankings are determined purely by quantitative data: no subjective judging\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eParticipants can monitor their position throughout the competition window\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch3\u003e📣 \u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eWhen Posting, Challenge\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003col\u003e\u003cli\u003e1. Install the Kraken CLI from the official repository\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e2. Configure your Kraken API access and connect it to your agent\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e3. Build an autonomous AI trading agent that analyzes signals and executes trades through Kraken CLI\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e4. Share your progress publicly as part of the Social Engagement challenge\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ol\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eERC-8004 Challenge\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003col\u003e\u003cli\u003e1. Register your agent identity on the ERC-8004 Identity Registry\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e2. Claim your sandbox capital from the Hackathon Capital Vault\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e3. Build your trustless trading or financial agent operating through the Risk Router\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e4. Record trust signals and compete on the on-chain leaderboard\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ol\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"\u003eCombining both\u003c/strong\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e?\u003c/strong\u003e Start with either challenge, then layer in the other for a combined submission eligible for prizes from both.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch2\u003e📘 \u003cstrong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0,  \u003ca href=\"https://strykr.ai/\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003e\u003cu\u003eStrykr\u003c/u\u003e \u003c/a\u003eis an agent-first market intelligence and execution platform that enables developers, traders, and AI systems to access and act on real-time financial data across all markets.\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\n  At its core is \u003ca href=\"https://www.prismapi.ai/\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\"\u003e\u003cu\u003ePRISM\u003c/u\u003e\u003c/a\n  \u003e, a canonical asset resolution engine that maps any ticker, symbol, or contract address across crypto, equities, forex, commodities, and more into a single persistent identity. PRISM continuously learns from usage, ensuring new or obscure assets are instantly resolvable.\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cbr /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eThe platform combines:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u0026nbsp;• Real-time market data (20+ sources)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u0026nbsp;• AI-powered signals and analysis\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u0026nbsp;• Execution integrations via deep links (perps, DEXs, brokers)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u0026nbsp;• A developer-ready API (244 endpoints, sub-100ms latency)\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr /\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eStrykr enables a full workflow from intent → insight → execution, making it possible for both humans and autonomous agents to trade and analyze markets in one unified system.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u003cbr /\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003ch3 data-section-id=\"1kqtusf\" data-start=\"618\" data-end=\"644\" style=\"--tw-scale-x: 1; 💰 $300\u003c/font\u003e\u003c/div\u003e"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"2a:T660,Please be aware that participation in lablab.ai hackathons is voluntary and subject to the specific rules and conditions outlined for each event. While we strive to provide a fair and rewarding experience for all participants, we cannot guarantee entry or success in securing prizes. All prizes and opportunities are subject to availability and participants must meet the established criteria to qualify. lablab.ai is not responsible nor held liable for any commitments or offers - including programs, giveaways, or prizes - made by third-party sponsors or partners of the hackathon. The availability and delivery of third-party prizes or benefits are solely at the discretion of the respective sponsors and are not guaranteed by lablab.ai. We reserve the right to make amendments, modifications, or cancellations to any part of the hackathon (including full cancellation of the event itself), including prizes and terms of participation, at our sole discretion. Whenever possible, we will endeavor to notify participants of significant changes within a reasonable timeframe. All submissions by participants must be original work, open source, and compliant with the MIT License unless specified otherwise. By participating, you agree to these terms, the overall event terms, and the lablab.ai general terms and are encouraged to review all event-related information carefully. Prize Distribution: lablab.ai and its partners reserve the right to distribute all prizes within a 90-day period following the end date of the hackathon. This period allows for the proper processing and verification needed to award prizes appropriately.2b:T3165,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cspan style=\"--tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; Prize Distribution\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e• All prizes are distributed in tokens.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e• Tokens are vested via \u003ca href=\\\"https://streamflow.finance/\\\" rel=\\\"noopener noreferrer\\\" target=\\\"_blank\\\" style=\\\"color: rgb(74, 144, 226);\\\"\u003eStreamflow\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e• Token grants exceeding $10,000 are subject to a 12-month linear vesting schedule, with monthly unlocks.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e• Token grants below $10,000 are subject to a 6-month linear vesting schedule, with monthly unlocks.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e• Tokens are allocated approximately 4 weeks after the event concludes.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e• Teams are required to set up and use multi-signature wallets for receiving funds.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e•\u003c/strong\u003e\u0026nbsp;AI agents may also receive token allocations via agent-specific
